name: packrat_with_whitespace
description: Basic packrat parsing with whitespace rule

name: packrat_with_macro
grammar:
EXPRESSION <- _ LIST(TERM, TERM_OPERATOR)
TERM <- LIST(FACTOR, FACTOR_OPERATOR)
FACTOR <- NUMBER / T('(') EXPRESSION T(')')
TERM_OPERATOR <- T([-+])
FACTOR_OPERATOR <- T([*/])
NUMBER <- T([0-9]+)
~_ <- [ \t]*
LIST(I, D) <- I (D I)*
T(S) <- < S > _

name: packrat_with_precedence
grammar:
Expression <- Atom (Operator Atom)* { precedence L + - L * / }
Atom <- _? Number _?
Number <- [0-9]+
Operator <- '+' / '-' / '*' / '/'
_ <- ' '+

name: packrat_correctness
description: Packrat produces same results as non-packrat parsing
grammar:
S <- A / B
A <- X 'a'
B <- X 'b'
X <- 'x' 'y'?

name: packrat_with_semantic_actions
description: Packrat produces same parse results with semantic actions

name: packrat_cache_with_choice_backtracking
description: Packrat caches results and reuses them across choice alternatives
grammar:
S <- A B / A C
A <- 'hello'
B <- 'world'
C <- 'there'
%whitespace <- [ ]*
